sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n75107" key="o)ritrefh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὀρι-τρεφής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, and <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὀρί-τροφος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n75107.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ὀρειτρ-.</ref> </xr> </sense> </entryFree>
